title: rosa squarrosa var. cariotii
intro: Rosa squarrosa var. cariotii is a variety of the Rosa squarrosa species, commonly known as the cariot's rose, which is a type of wild rose native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Rosa squarrosa var. cariotii has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
